fundamentals.name: Spotify Technology S.A.
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: Spotify Technology S.A., together with its subsidiaries, provides audio streaming subscription services worldwide. It operates in two segments, Premium and Ad-Supported. The Premium segment offers online and offline streaming access to its catalog of music and podcasts, including video, lossless music, and audiobooks in select markets through subscription offerings primarily sold directly to end users and partners. The Ad-Supported segment provides limited on-demand online access to its catalog of music and online and offline access to its catalog of podcasts on computers, tablets, mobile devices, and other smart devices. The company also offers sales, distribution and marketing, contract research and development, and customer and other support services. Spotify Technology S.A. was incorporated in 2006 and is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.

judgment.summary: Spotify demonstrates robust earnings growth and strong profitability, though it carries significant leverage.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat estimates by 18%; next earnings date is 2026-07-28.
positives: Quarterly earnings growth of 220.4% and last quarter's EPS beat by 18% indicate strong operational performance.
Operating margin of 15.8% and profit margin of 15.4% show healthy profitability.
Return on equity at 38.0% and return on assets at 11.6% reflect efficient use of capital.
Free cash flow of $707.75M (TTM) and a current ratio of 2.06 suggest good liquidity and cash generation.
negatives: Debt/Equity ratio of 5.94 indicates significant financial leverage.
Revenue growth of 8.2% YoY is modest compared to earnings growth.
PEG ratio of 2.17 suggests the stock may be somewhat overvalued relative to its expected earnings growth.

news.paragraph: Spotify Technology S.A. (SPOT) reported its first quarter financial results for the period ending March 31, 2026, with an 18% EPS surprise and a 220.4% quarterly earnings growth. The company's strong earnings performance and a consensus 'buy' rating from 39 analysts suggest positive momentum. The next earnings date is set for July 28, 2026, providing a near-term catalyst for the stock.
